name: musubi
description: Musubi monorepo — open, self-hostable shared calendar.

scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @musubi/client exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p apps/api/tsconfig.json --noEmit --skipLibCheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @musubi/client exec tsx lib/eventForm.test.ts && pnpm --filter @musubi/client exec tsx lib/rrule.test.ts && pnpm --filter @musubi/client exec tsx lib/ics.test.ts && pnpm --filter @musubi/api test && pnpm --filter @musubi/db test
scripts.check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm lint && pnpm build

author: frgtn.dev
